description: initial TLT 60d plus6/minus3 drop-neutral baseline fully collapsed into all-positive predictions and is a candidate for formulation change rather than feature tuning
keep-all-binary only produced another all-positive TLT classifier and confirmed that neutral filtering was not the real blocker
60d plus8/minus4 reduced the all-positive collapse in TLT but remained too weak to justify staying on the current binary workflow
60d plus4/minus2 improved headline score only by becoming another nearly all-positive TLT classifier
